validator_round_3.diagnostic: container of kind 'evidence' contains no valid content besides caption (Methods.md, {evidence} directive)

remediation_actions_round4.action: Patched plugins/evidence-explorer.mjs run() so the {evidence} directive emits a `code` (lang=json) child node plus a `caption` node, instead of a bare paragraph. This satisfies the MyST container validator's rule that a container of kind='evidence' must contain valid content (image, referenced notebook cell, table, code, iframe, or subfigure). The JSON payload encodes {section, body} so the directive remains semantically useful for evidence-package navigation.
